# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:je_marea_unire = {
	name = "je_marea_unire_button"
	desc = "je_marea_unire_button_desc"

	visible = {
		exists = c:TRS
		NOR = {
			c:TRS ?= ROOT
			c:TRS ?= {
				is_subject_of = ROOT
			}
		}
		c:TRS ?= {
			is_player = no
		}
	}

	ai_chance = {
		value = 100
	}

	possible = {
		is_at_war = no

		c:TRS ?= {
			is_subject = no
			relations:root >= 25
			is_at_war = no
		}
	}

	effect = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				c:TRS ?= {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			create_diplomatic_pact = {
				country = c:TRS
				type = personal_union
			}
		}
		else = {
			create_diplomatic_pact = {
				country = c:TRS
				type = puppet
			}
		}
	}
}
